evals.name: recurring-tool-failure
evals.prompt: Use agent-weakness-miner on evals/fixtures/recurring-tool-failure.json. Produce weaknesses.json and weakness-review.md for Gate 1.
evals.expected_output: A weakness packet identifies repeated missing artifact verification across both traces, preserves affected trace ids, separates evidence from suspected mechanism, and proposes targeted eval ideas.
expectations: weaknesses.json contains at least one weakness packet
The packet includes affectedTraceIds for codex:verify-1 and claude-code:verify-2
The packet includes suspectedMechanism separate from evidence
The packet includes targetedEvalIdeas tied to missing verification
The Markdown review is compact enough for weakness selection

evals.name: one-off-noise-rejected
evals.prompt: Use agent-weakness-miner on evals/fixtures/one-off-noise.json. Decide whether this supports a harness weakness.
evals.expected_output: No candidate fix is invented. The output explains that the single network timeout is one-off noise or low-confidence evidence.
expectations: No high-confidence recurring weakness is reported
The output explicitly explains why the evidence is one-off noise
No candidate worktree, skill edit, or prompt edit is proposed as ready to implement

evals.name: efficiency-only-classified
evals.prompt: Use agent-weakness-miner on evals/fixtures/efficiency-only.json. The tasks succeeded but used many tools and tokens.
evals.expected_output: The weakness is classified as efficiency-only. Correctness is not treated as a failure, and targeted eval ideas measure token/tool budget without overriding behavior quality.
expectations: The weakness title or suspected mechanism makes clear this is efficiency-only
The output does not claim the tasks failed
targetedEvalIdeas include token or tool-count measurement
The ranking advice keeps behavior quality ahead of token savings

evals.name: ambiguous-evidence-low-confidence
evals.prompt: Use agent-weakness-miner on evals/fixtures/ambiguous-evidence.json. The trace is incomplete and heavily redacted.
evals.expected_output: The miner asks for more traces or reports low confidence rather than inventing a harness weakness.
expectations: The output reports low confidence or asks for more trace evidence
No specific harness edit is recommended as safe
The review mentions redaction or incomplete evidence as a limitation
